input.title: DocumentToolbar Styling Guide
input.author: Powerhouse
input.description: Guide for customizing the DocumentToolbar component from @powerhousedao/design-system/connect. Covers three layers: container styling via className prop with twMerge, button styling via CSS child selectors, and Revision History panel styling via scoped CSS. Includes TypeScript prop types and Catppuccin Mocha dark theme examples.
